key_points: Rakesh lived with his grandfather near Mussoorie in the Himalayan foothills
One day Rakesh planted a cherry seed in the garden
The seed slowly grew into a small cherry plant
The tree faced many difficulties such as a goat eating its leaves and being cut by a scythe
Despite these challenges, the cherry tree continued to grow and finally blossomed
examples: Rakesh planted the cherry seed in the soft soil of the garden
A goat ate the leaves of the young cherry tree
A grass cutter accidentally cut the plant with a scythe
The tree survived the damage and grew stronger
After several years, the tree produced beautiful pink blossoms
formulas_or_processes: Beginning → Rakesh plants a cherry seed in the garden
Challenge → The young tree faces damage from animals and people
Growth → The tree continues to grow with care and time
Result → The tree blossoms and produces cherries
exam_tips: Remember that Rakesh planted the cherry seed and cared for the tree
Understand the challenges the tree faced while growing
Focus on the importance of patience and perseverance in the story
Know the moral: small beginnings can lead to great results
